chatter: Someone needs to fill this saddle.
"Gunslinger" never made sense to me. I don't sling guns; I sling bullets.
Got a good cigar and a big iron on my hip. What more does a man need? Maybe something to drink...
Not as quick as I used to be, but I'm still the fastest gun in the New West.
Oh, we're in the thick of it now.
One more mission, huh? I'm in.
People say, Cassidy, you're a cowboy, how come you don't say 'howdy' more? Well, I may be a cowboy, but I ain't a cliché.

There we were, watching the world’s most well-guarded train wind across that purple valley. And I said to Ashe, "You... sure about this?" And she said... well, I can't repeat what she said in polite company.
Things were a lot simpler when I was robbing banks with the Deadlock Gang .
Always felt a little out of place in Overwatch, but I'm still not sure I belong with y'all. (with only Talon members on the team)
Let's get this show on the road!
Almost got this in the bag. Don't let up!
Hope they've packed up their bags for when we drive 'em out.
One more of those and we can go home happy.
We just need to win one more round. No problem.
Bring it in. Let's make a plan.
Not our finest hour, but we can still make it right.
We can't afford to lose another one. Everyone, buckle up.
We need to win this one, so let's put our heads together.
All comes down to this... the final draw.
This is it, let's get it done.
Bit early to dust off the boots.
Come on, Cole. Try a little harder.
Death ain't on my doorstep yet.
They still haven't seen my ace.
Coulda sworn there were some other jokers around here...
Feeling a bit lonesome. Where's my team?
I feel like a new man.
Not bad, if I do say so myself.
I call that a silver bullet.
Thanks. Put it on my tab.
They really don't know when to quit.
Think they have more to say.
Well, well! They're back for more.
call-outs: They got us outnumbered. Keep that in mind.
Got someone lurkin' around over here...
Now I can't see ya, but I know you're there.
By all means, come try your luck!
This is what I call power!
Keep the heat on 'em and this win is ours!
They're outta time! Don't let 'em through!
We just need to hold 'em off a little longer!
Ain't much time left! Roll 'em over!
Objective's lost if we don't get a move-on!
We need to take the objective now!
eliminations: All in a day's work.
Bullseye.
Chew on that.
Come and get it.
Dead on.
Dead to rights.
Eh, that's your sunset.
Get along, now.
I never miss my mark.
Just a matter of time.
Quit makin' yourself an easy target.
Ooh! Right where it hurts!
See that?
You don't know when to quit.
You had it comin'.
You needed killin'.
You really underestimatin' me?
You tangled with the wrong man.
You'll need more grit than that!
You're not the first to learn that lesson.
It's not exactly personal. (eliminating Ashe )
Learned that one from you. (eliminating Ana )
Throught you'd be too upstandin' for Talon. (eliminating Emre )
"Dead or alive". Ain't that right, Freja? (eliminating Freja )
Wouldn't call that your best shot. (eliminating Hanzo or Widowmaker )
I hate to do the law a favor. (eliminating Hazard )
Well, aren't you a troublemaker? (eliminating Hazard )
Not quite like the westerns, huh, partner? (eliminating Juno )
Long overdue. (eliminating Moira )
Took some pleasure in that. (eliminating Moira )
Reap the rewards you came for. (eliminating Reaper )
Don't fancy getting hammered on the job. (eliminating Reinhardt )
A hog-killin' time! (eliminating Roadhog )
*sigh* All these years, still cleanin' up after Reyes. (eliminating Vendetta )
How many shots was that?! (eliminating Widowmaker )
You're still wet behind the ears. (eliminating Wuyang )
Easy pickings.
Left yourself wide open.
Like shootin' fish in a barrel.
Right in my line of fire.
Someone call the undertaker.
Ooh. Almost had me, that time. (on low HP)
Safe by a whisker. (on low HP)
Thought I was a goner. (on low HP)
The ol' razzle dazzle. (headshot)
Not every fight's a fair one. (using secondary fire)
That's how you fan the hammer. (using secondary fire)
Maximum range. *laughs* (long-range final blow)
That shot would make Bars jealous! (long-range final blow)
Gonna give myself whiplash. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Slow down! (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Come on down. (eliminating airborne enemy)
Head in the clouds, but your grave's down here. (eliminating airborne enemy)
Stuck your landin', huh? (eliminating airborne enemy)
Lookin' a little chilly there. (eliminating frozen enemy)
Relax. (elimating any enemy using ultimate ability)
Looks like it's sundown. (eliminating Illari using Captive Sun)
You know you just... hang there when you do that?! (eliminating Pharah using Barrage)
Another freight train down. (eliminating Reinhardt using Charge)
In a hurry? (eliminating Reinhardt using Charge)
What's the rush? (eliminating Reinhardt using Charge)
*laugh* Where you goin'? (eliminating Reinhardt using Charge)
*chuckles* Thanks for the vantage, doctor. (eliminating Sigma using Gravitic Flux)
I could get used to workin' with Gravity Man. (eliminating enemy stuck in friendly Sigma 's Gravitic Flux)
Looked a little starstruck. (eliminating enemy stuck in friendly Sigma 's Gravitic Flux)
Hah! Now what were you doing there?! (eliminating Sombra using Stealth)
Sombra! Don't sneak in front of a gun! (eliminating Sombra using Stealth)
Way ahead of you, Lena. (eliminating Tracer using Recall)
Takes a lot of punishment when he's mad, huh? (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
Like shooting trout in a whirlpool. (eliminating enemy stuck in Zarya 's Graviton Surge)
It's a Cole day in hell.
Move 'em up, get 'em out!
No one can hold me down!
Ready to throw in the towel?
Set 'em up, knock 'em down.
Trigger finger's still itchin'!
Ahh... that still hits the spot, Ana. (while/after Nano-Boosted by Ana )
Anyone else?
Clean sweep.
Cleaned 'em up nice.
Did I miss anybody?
It's a bone orchard out here!
Plenty more where that came from.
Y'all had it coming.
Yippee ki yay!
Mopped the floor with 'em!
They're all down! That was some fine work.
Well, now, that couldn't have gone any better!
Counted your chickens too early.
I'm just settlin' a score.
Keep the change.
Payin' you back in kind.
Good thing you ain't alone out here.
Just watchin' your back.
That was a close one.
Too early to kick the bucket.
I'll regret this later, won't I? (to Ashe )
I've had enough of saving your hide. (to Ashe or Reaper )
Reminds me of old times. (to Reaper )
Hey, hands off the merchandise.
I love a good brawl.
You'll feel that one tomorrow.
Makes us about even. (eliminating Ashe )
Technically, you jumped into my fist. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
*laughs*
Farewell and good riddance.
Off the cliff you go!
Hah! That'll teach you.
Enemy turret destroyed.
Hey! At least give 'em a chance!
Hoo, nice one!
Next round's on me.
Now color me impressed.
Now that was a sight for sore eyes.
*laughs* Remind me to stay off your bad side.
Just like old times. (to Ashe or Reaper )
Side by side again, ninja. (to Genji )
Pretty handy with that bow. (to Hanzo )
Old man's still got it. (to Soldier: 76 or Torbjörn )
Good aim. (to Widowmaker )
interactions: Cassidy : You know, I haven't had any real competition at the range lately. Ana : There are plenty of moving targets on the battlefield. Cassidy : I'll... take that as a no.
Cassidy : Think I owe you a round, ma'am. Those names you gave me have turned out to be mighty fine recruits. Ana : They were useless in my hands. You're the one who made something of them.
Cassidy : You always bring out the best in me. Ana : Oh, enough!
Cassidy : How's Bars doin'? Surprised she didn't take my head off last time I stopped by. Ashe : She's not gonna miss if you come 'round again.
Cassidy : Wouldn't exactly say it's nice to see you again. Ashe : Bite me. Cassidy : I'd rather bite the dust. Ashe : Good. I'll kick some up for you.

Ashe : Stone Anthony says you still owe him five hundred dollars for that weekend in Tucson. Cassidy : He's welcome to come collect. Ashe : Seems to think you're going to shoot him dead if he does. Cassidy : ...Must not want it that bad, then.
Ashe : Good thing your brains aren't made of dynamite. Cassidy : Yeah? Why's that? Ashe : Wouldn't be enough up there to blow your nose. Cassidy : You seem a little stuffy yourself.

Cassidy : Heard the news about Frankie . She 'n Bez finally got hitched? Ashe : Hm. Cassidy : Glad to hear they're gettin' on well. That goes for all of you. Ashe : And we're all tickled pink to hear it.

Cassidy : I'm feelin' generous today, Ashe. Think I might just remember where I left your bike after all. Ashe : I don't want it. Cassidy : What? I thought you loved that bike! You bluffin', Ashe? Ashe : I never bluff. You oughta know that by now.
Ashe : I'll only ask one more time, Cassidy. Where'd you leave my bike? Cassidy : Not sure you wanna know. Ashe : If I find even a scratch on it, Bob is gonna use you for target practice!
Baptiste : Hey, Cassidy. Want to know the bounty Talon had on you? Cassidy : Higher or lower than the one on Amari ? Baptiste : Lower. Cassidy : Damn it!

Baptiste : I'm surprised you're sticking around. Cassidy : Was going to leave, but I reckon you'd miss me too much. Baptiste : True! Nobody does "second most handsome man on the team" better than you.
Baptiste : Line them up. Cassidy : ...Knock 'em down!

Cassidy : Bastion. Have you by chance got a can-opener in there? I'm aiming to crack open a snack. Bastion : *regretful beeps* Cassidy : Of course not... would be wholly unlike Lindholm to give you something useful.
Brigitte : My dad says a lot of your missions were disasters. Cassidy : Well, if he made me the robo-horse I asked for, maybe I would've stood a better chance.
Cassidy : You remind me of myself when I was younger. D.Va : Uh, I'm way cooler than you! Cassidy : That's exactly what I would've said! All you're missin' is the hat and cigar.

Cassidy : D.Va! You said you wanted to tell me more about this Pachi-Fella's friends? *[variant 1]* D.Va : Yeah, yeah! You remember Yachemon, right? Cassidy : Yeah. The sausage... but you said his name means "vegetable man"? D.Va : Because he's a vegetarian! Are you even listening?! *[variant 2]* D.Va : Oh, yeah! So there's Geranman. He's pretty new to the crew. Cassidy : Right... he's got that square around his mouth. D.Va : *frustrated sigh* It's a goatee, duh!

Doomfist : Overwatch again, Cassidy? Haven't they proven unworthy of your talents? Cassidy : Well, it's that or spend the rest of my life passed out in various diners. Doomfist : There are other options. Cassidy : Sorry, uh... Talon 's my third choice.
Doomfist : You didn't fail Overwatch, Cassidy. Overwatch failed you . Cassidy : I'm pretty sure it was mutual.
Echo : Cole Cassidy. Cole Cassidy. Cole Cassidy. Cassidy : You called? Echo : I just like saying your name. That's all.
Echo : I think I can pull off a cowboy hat. Cassidy : Want me to buy you one? Echo : No need. I'll just borrow yours.

Cassidy : Was a little jealous of you back in the day, you know. Always made everything look so easy. Emre : That's funny. I felt the same about you. Cassidy : *chuckles* I don't buy that for a minute. Emre : Coming from the black-ops cowboy? Yeah, right.

Cassidy : You ain't the only one who tried bounty huntin' when Overwatch fell through. Freja : Hm. You gave up quick. Cassidy : Well, I realized that huntin' ain't always helpin'. Reckon you might feel the same, someday. Freja : No one wanted my help. At least this way, I'm useful.
Cassidy : This one might get tricky. Can I count on you to watch my back? Genji : Of course. You are like a brother to me. Cassidy : You've told me about your family. Not sure that's a compliment.
Genji : You haven't slept. Cassidy : *laugh* Yeah. Was up last night, thinking about who we used to be. Genji : I try to focus on the good times. Cassidy : Hey, yeah. We did have some of those!

Cassidy : All this trouble with Talon ... ever make you think about Blackwatch ? The hurt we caused? Genji : Sometimes. I try to not to let the guilt weigh on me. Cassidy : Wish I could just undo it all. Go back, fix those regrets. Genji : We made mistakes, Cole. Now, all we can do is stand together against them.

Cassidy : Reckon we've got another Bartalotti to stop. Should be easier without all the sneaking around . Genji : And you won't have to speak Italian this time. Cassidy : Well, don't speak so soon, "signore." Genji : Hah. (Japanese: Moron...)
Moira : *sigh* What a nauseating bout of déjà vu. Cassidy : Yep. Working with you has always made me sick. Reaper : Are you planning to whine the whole time... again? Genji : *sigh*
Cassidy : You know, that sake's not half bad... but I prefer a little bite to my liquor. Hanzo : How predictable. Such an unsophisticated taste.
Cassidy : I appreciate a man with traditional taste in armaments. Hanzo : Have you ever fired a bow? Cassidy : No, but you won't catch me with one of those pulse rifles, either.

Hazard : Where's your lasso, cowboy? Aren't ye gonna hogtie me? Collect the bounty? Cassidy : Lucky for you, I hung up that hat years ago. Hazard : Then why are you still wearin' it? Cassidy : *chuckles* Guess I just like the look of it.

Hazard : Ashe told me about you. Cassidy : Is that right? What'd she have to say? Hazard : That you betrayed her and left Deadlock in the dust. For Overwatch ! Cassidy : Not quite how I remember it... but I recon you wouldn't care to hear my side.
Cassidy : Can't you do somethin' about the glare when you get all up in the sky like that? Illari : Turn down the brightness on your flashbang. Then we'll talk.

Cassidy: Now, if I give you this treat, you'd better tell your ma, you hear? Jetpack Cat: *eager meows* (if Brigitte is on the team): Brigitte: Cassidy, you're gonna teach her to beg! ...Aww, but she has been so good lately, hasn't she?

Cassidy: You rob any trains in your day? Junkrat: Agh, they get all gummed up together in a big pile when I try! Cassidy: ...You're supposed to stop them first. Junkrat: I do stop them. I think my problem is that I stop them a little too hard.

Lifeweaver : You're so old-fashioned, Reinhardt. A hammer? How marvelous! Reinhardt : I suppose you think I should have a giant laser gun. Lifeweaver : No! Lean into it! Get Lindholm to build you one of his big robotic horses . (if Cassidy is on the team): Cassidy : ...What did you just say?

Lúcio : Still can't believe I get to work with a real cowboy... What's it like in the American West? Cassidy : Lizards and dirt, far as the eye can see. Lúcio : Wow! That sounds amazing . Cassidy : *chuckle* Beats the city, I'll tell you that.

Lúcio : So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: what is your favorite animal? Cassidy : [one of 3]: *groan* I can never remember the name. It's... half black, half white, with a dangly nose? It's that... you know, pig thing. Like, the fancy jungle pig. What's that jungle animal, with the... funky snout? Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Cassidy : Must cost a fortune to spill all those bullets. Mauga : Good thing I'm not paying for it!
Cassidy : Hey Dr. Zhou. Is it gonna rain? Mei : Looks like a 30% chance of precipitation. Cassidy : So... maybe. * sigh * The marvels of modern science.

Cassidy : You might be able to beat me in basketball, but... how about a couple rounds of bowling? Pharah : So, you want me to beat you at every sport, then? Mercy : Ooh! If I come, can we play with bumpers?

Cassidy : Remember when we took one of these for a joyride? Pharah : I remember my C.O. yelling at me for goofing around with Overwatch agents. Cassidy : That's your problem! Always worrying about breaking the rules. (one of two): Mercy : Someone has to keep you in order, Cole. Pharah : We can't all damn the consequences and ride off into the sunset, Cole.
Cassidy : Hey there, Moira. How've you been? Moira : Busier than you, I assume. Cassidy : *chuckles* I've missed you, too. You look great, by the way. Moira : Same saccharine tongue, same empty head.
Cassidy : A friend told me that you're gettin' rusty. Reaper : You don't have friends.

Cassidy : I hear a lot of folks say "chivalry is dead", but I'm glad to see it's alive 'n well with you, partner. Reinhardt : And look at you, making the old west young again! Cassidy : *chuckles* Oh, I think I've seen too many sunsets to call myself young. Reinhardt : Young or old, I'll be proud to chase the next one by your side!

(with at least two of the following heroes on the team: Baptiste , D.Va , Echo , Pharah or Zarya ) Reinhardt : Look at these fresh faces! What do we owe you for bringing them in, Cole? Cassidy : Don't care to keep a ledger these days. Heh. What do you say we call it settled? Reinhardt : Deal! It's an honor just to fight at their side! Cassidy : *chuckles* Couldn't agree more, old timer.

Sigma : An American cow hand! Has this dimension shifted timescales? Cassidy : That's right, big man. It's the 1880's all over again. Sigma : Remarkable! How far are we from Bonn? I'd like to meet Heinrich Hertz.
Sigma : Oh! Where has everyone gone? Cassidy : Don't worry, big man! We took care of 'em.
Sojourn : Interesting choices, Cole. A professional gamer , a Russian powerlifter , two mercenaries ... Cassidy : You like 'em. Sojourn : *chuckle* I really do.

Cassidy : Been awful quiet around these parts since Null Sector turned tail. Sojourn : Yeah, but I'm not convinced the fighting's over. Cassidy : You hopin' the world might still need us, after all? Sojourn : I'm never hoping for a storm. Doesn't mean I can stop one from rolling in.
Cassidy : I'll never forgive us for what we did in Hanamura . Soldier: 76 : Those people were criminals. Cassidy : ...So were we.

Sombra : Every time I need a laugh, I look at your search history. Cassidy : *sigh* Let me guess. Last night, around dinner time? Sombra : "Cactus spines in butt. How get rid of?" Cassidy : Was I supposed to leave 'em in there?!
Cassidy : We should catch up sometime soon. Sombra : Why? I already know what you've been up to. Cassidy : ...But I don't. Sombra : And the problem is?
Torbjörn : Don't you ever wanna settle down? Cassidy : Maybe. Trouble is, I got some itchy feet. Torbjörn : I've got some powder for that!
Torbjörn : You sure you won't let me upgrade that arm? Cassidy : Ah... you know I like it old school.

Tracer : I heard you were a bounty hunter in the years after Overwatch went down. Cassidy : Who told you that...? Tracer : Did you catch anybody good? Cassidy : My bills were always paid. I'll leave it at that.

Cassidy : I know my regrets ain't gonna bring him back, but... I am sorry about how things went down with your father . Vendetta : Don't be. You played your part in his downfall. Better than he could have foreseen.
Vendetta : You parade around like some righteous outlaw, and yet I doubt you could even throw a lasso. Cassidy : If it meant I'd catch you on the other end, I wager I'd aim it just right.
Cassidy : Your father was a bad man, but he wasn't a tyrant. This ain't what he would've wanted. Vendetta : If you think my ambitions end at my father's wants, you're more fooled than you look.

Venture : Wow! Are you, like, a real cowboy? Do you have any cool stories?! Cassidy : Not sure you are old enough to hear 'em, kid. Venture : I'm... in my twenties. Cassidy : *chuckles* Give it a few years.
Winston : Anyone wanna hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Cassidy : I-I'm still puzzlin' over the last one.

Cassidy : I'd get dizzy always rollin' around like that. Tell me you're always right side up. Wrecking Ball : The hamster says that unlike you, he does not imitate tumbleweeds. Cassidy : Hey, now. What's that supposed to mean?!
Wuyang : I hope I'm keeping up okay. You guys really are the best of the best. Cassidy : Kid, I was halfway to the jailhouse when they picked me up. I'd say you're doin' just fine.
map-specific: Sittin' in cafes all day, drinkin' good espresso, eatin' pasta with eight-syllable names... Not a bad way to live.
This city is louder than a field of Montana grasshoppers. Y'know, the ones as big as your thumb?
Ain't no prairie, but these mountains sure got a nice view.
Now this is one place that knows how to throw a party.
